title: Collect samples for a rural production or horticulture monitoring program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Collect samples for a rural production or horticulture monitoring program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan for collection of samples

pcs.text: Confirm purpose and scope of sample collection activity with supervisor or from work instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm purpose and scope of sample collection activity with supervisor or from work instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm purpose and scope of sample collection activity with supervisor or from work instructions.

pcs.text: Confirm sample collection schedule with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm sample collection schedule with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm sample collection schedule with supervisor.

pcs.text: Confirm sampling site location and gain approval for site access where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm sampling site location and gain approval for site access where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm sampling site location and gain approval for site access where required.

pcs.text: Identify samples to be collected and preserved with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify samples to be collected and preserved with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify samples to be collected and preserved with supervisor.

pcs.text: Assess range of likely operating conditions, hazards and difficult or sensitive environments for impact on sampling and testing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess range of likely operating conditions, hazards and difficult or sensitive environments for impact on sampling and testing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess range of likely operating conditions, hazards and difficult or sensitive environments for impact on sampling and testing.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Collect data or record sheets or books for use

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect data or record sheets or books for use.

pcs.text: Move tools, equipment, data sheets and personnel to sampling sites and prepare for use

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Move tools, equipment, data sheets and personnel to sampling sites and prepare for use.
